thoughts: Today is Wednesday (April 1, 2026).
According to the rules: Tuesday-Saturday → DAYS=2.
I need to run the gchat_reader.py script with DAYS=2.
The script requires Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.
After starting, I'll monitor the debug log up to 10 times with 30-second intervals.
On completion/failure, I'll send a notification using the notify.py script.
